metaDesc: Landela uhlelo lweThestamente Elidala, ukuphila kukaJesu, nezohambo zikaPawulu ebalazweni langempela — iBhayibheli lenzeka ezindaweni zangempela.

s.title: IBhayibheli Ngebalazwe
s.verse: “Ngokuba sasingalandeli izinganekwane zobuqili, lapho sanazisa amandla nokufika kweNkosi yethu uJesu Kristu, kodwa sasingababonayo amandla obukhosi bakhe.” (2 Petru 1:16)
s.purpose: IBhayibheli akusiyo inganekwane. Liwumlando wabantu abahamba ezindaweni, ezinsukwini, nasemagameni angempela. Landela leyo migwaqo ebalazweni, ngokulandelana kwesikhathi — cindezela iphuzu, noma ucindezele ▶ ukuze uhambe kulo kancane kancane.
s.ot_lead: Akusilo uhambo olulodwa kodwa ukugeleza komlando wensindiso kusukela ekudalweni: ukudala nokuwa → uzamcolo neBabele → ukubizwa (u-Abrahama) → izwe lesithembiso → ukuPhuma → ehlane → ukunqoba → umbuso → ukuhlukana → ukuthunjwa → ukubuya.
s.je_lead: Landela ukuphila kukaJesu njengoba amaVangeli ekulandisa, ngokulandelana — kusukela ekuzalweni kwakhe eBhetlehema kudlula ukubhapathizwa kwakhe nenkonzo yaseGalile, kuwele iSamariya, kuye esiphambanweni, ukuvuka nokwenyukela eJerusalema.
s.pa_h: Kusukela e-Antiyokiya kuya emikhawulweni yomhlaba — iRoma
s.pa_lead: Kusukela ePhentekoste eJerusalema, indlela ivangeli elasabalala ngayo ngaphandle kweJudiya — kudlula i-Asia Encane neYurophu kuya enhliziyweni yombuso. Khetha olunye lwezohambo ezinhlanu (olwoku-1·olwesi-2·olwesi-3 + uhambo oluya eRoma + ngemva kokukhululwa) ulandele izehlakalo zezEnzo nezincwadi ezabhalwa endleleni.
s.foot: Imithombo · Izindawo zilandela umbhalo weBhayibheli nejografi evamile yeBhayibheli (namagama anamuhla lapho esiza). Imincele yolwandle, imifula namachibi kudwetshwa ngedatha yejografi evulekile (Natural Earth), yenziwa lula.

eden.name: I-Edene (Ukudala · Ukuwa)
eden.note: Ezweni elalenziwe “lihle kakhulu,” isono siyangena siphule isibopho phakathi kukaNkulunkulu nabantu.
events: Isithembiso sokuqala sevangeli — “inzalo yowesifazane iyochoboza ikhanda lenyoka”

noah.name: I-Ararati (uZamcolo)
noah.note: UNkulunkulu wahlulela izwe eligcwele isono, kodwa wagcina ukuphila ngomndeni owodwa.
events: Isivumelwano sothingo — “ngeke kuphinde kube nozamcolo wokuchitha”

babel.name: Umbhoshongo waseBabele
babel.note: Maqondana nokuziphakamisa okufinyelela ezulwini, uNkulunkulu uxuba ulimi lwabo abahlakaze abantu emhlabeni.

ur.name: I-Uri
ur.note: Indaba yeBhayibheli yensindiso iqala ngokubizwa komuntu oyedwa.
events: UNkulunkulu ubiza u-Abrama aphume e-Uri lamaKhaledi
“Ngiyakukwenza isizwe esikhulu… imindeni yonke ibusiswe ngawe”

haran.name: IHarana
events: U-Abrama usuka eya eKhanani eneminyaka engama-75

shechem.name: IShekemu · iKhanani
shechem.note: Ezweni lesithembiso kusungulwa umndeni, isivumelwano sidlulele ezizukulwaneni.
events: Ukungena eKhanani, i-altare lokuqala — “lo mhlaba ngiyawunika inzalo yakho”
Amadodana ayishumi nambili kaJakobe — impande yezizwe eziyishumi nambili

egypt.name: IGibithe (iGosheni)
egypt.note: Umndeni uba yisizwe esikhulu — bese uba yisizwe sezigqila.
events: Umndeni wonke kaJakobe wehlela phansi ukubalekela indlala

sinai.name: INtaba iSinayi
sinai.note: Insindiso enkulu kakhulu yeThestamente Elidala — izigqila ziba ngabantu bakaNkulunkulu uqobo.

kadesh.name: IKadeshi (ihlane)
kadesh.note: Ukungakholwa kubiza isizukulwane izwe — kepha uNkulunkulu uhlala nabo.
events: Izinhloli eziyishumi nambili — kepha abantu benqaba ukwethemba
Iminyaka engu-38 ehlane — imana, ifu nomlilo

shiloh.name: IShilo (abaHluleli)
shiloh.note: Kungekho nkosi, yilowo nalowo wenza okumthokozisayo — kudingeka inkosi yangempela.
events: URuthe — ukwethembeka ezinsukwini ezimnyama, ohlangothini lukaDavide

jerusalem.name: IJerusalema · Umbuso Ohlangene
jerusalem.note: Isikhathi segolide sika-Israyeli — nesithembiso senkosi yaphakade.
events: USawule inkosi yokuqala, bese uDavide noGoliyati
Isivumelwano sikaDavide — “isihlalo sakho sobukhosi kuze kube phakade” (2 Samuweli 7)

samaria.name: ISamariya · Umbuso Ohlukene
samaria.note: Umbuso uyahlukana wehle njengoba abaprofethi bekhala.
events: Ngemva kukaSolomoni, ukuhlukana kube nguJuda no-Israyeli
U-Eliya, u-Isaya, uJeremiya bekhala bethi ‘buyani’ — babikezele uMesiya

nineveh.name: INineve (i-Asiriya)
nineveh.note: Ngokunganaki zonke izexwayiso, inyakatho iwa kuqala.

babylon.name: IBabele
babylon.note: Ubusuku obumnyama kunabo bonke — kepha isithembiso sokubuyiselwa sisekhona.

susa.name: ISusa (iPheresiya)
susa.note: Ngisho nasenhliziyweni yombuso wabezizwe, uNkulunkulu uyabagcina abantu bakhe.
events: UNehemiya uthandaza phambi kwenkosi futhi uyathunywa

return.name: Ukubuyela eJerusalema
return.note: Bayabuya bakhe kabusha — kodwa ayikho inkosi efikile. Balindela uMesiya.
events: Amagagasi amathathu okubuya ngomthetho kaKoresi (uZerubabeli 538 · u-Ezra 458 · uNehemiya 444)
Ithempeli liyakhiwa kabusha nezindonga zaseJerusalema ziyabuyiselwa
UMalaki — iThestamente Elidala liyavalwa: “Bhekani, ngiyathuma isithunywa sami”

bethlehem.name: IBhetlehema
bethlehem.note: UMesiya owathenjiswa uza emzini kaDavide — uLizwi waba yinyama.

nazareth.name: INazaretha
events: Eneminyaka eyishumi nambili, ebuza ephendula ethempelini

jordan.name: Umfula iJordani
jordan.note: Inkonzo yakhe yasobala iyaqala — izulu liyambeka njengeNdodana.
events: UMoya wehla njengejuba — “Lo uyiNdodana yami ethandekayo”

cana.name: IKana
cana.note: Esimangalisweni sakhe sokuqala wembula inkazimulo yakhe.
events: Amanzi enziwa iwayini — isimangaliso sakhe sokuqala

sychar.name: ISikari (iSamariya)
sychar.note: Umgwaqo wenkonzo yokuqala — kudlula eJerusalema kuye eSamariya eyedelelwayo.

capernaum.name: IKapernawume
capernaum.note: Isizinda senkonzo yaseGalile — ukubiza, ukufundisa nokuphikiswa konke kuhlangana lapha.

galilee.name: ULwandle lwaseGalile
galilee.note: Ngamandla phezu kwemvelo ubonisa ukuthi ungubani.
events: Usuthisa abangu-5 000 ngezinkwa ezinhlanu nezinhlanzi ezimbili

caesarea_p.name: IKesariya Filipi
caesarea_p.note: Abafundi bayaqonda ukuthi unguKristu, indlela yesiphambano ivuleke.

bethany.name: IBethaniya
bethany.note: Ubonisa amandla phezu kokufa ngosuku olwandulela isonto lakhe lokugcina.

jerusalem.name: IJerusalema
jerusalem.note: Isicongo lonke iBhayibheli elikhomba kuso — isiphambano, ukuvuka, ukwenyukela.
events: Ukungena ngokunqoba; uphinde agumbuqele amatafula ethempeli
Uvuka ngosuku lwesithathu, bese wenyukela ezulwini

antioch.name: I-Antiyokiya
antioch.note: Ibandla elithumayo lapho inkonzo yabezizwe iqala futhi ibuyele khona.
events: Ibandla lapho amakholwa aqala ukubizwa ngokuthi ‘amaKristu’
Indawo yokuphuma kohambo lokuqala, olwesibili nolwesithathu

perga.name: IPega
perga.note: Itheku lasePhamfiliya — lapha uJohane Marku ubuyela emuva.

iconium.name: I-Ikoniyu
iconium.note: Abaningi bayakholwa, kodwa ushushiso lubaphoqa ukuqhubeka.

lystra.name: IListra
events: Ekhandwe ngamatshe washiywa kungathi ufile, uyavuka

derbe.name: IDerbe
derbe.note: Kwenziwa abafundi abaningi; baphinda izinyathelo zabo ukuqinisa amabandla.

troas.name: ITrowa
troas.note: Iphuzu lokuphenduka lapho ivangeli liqala ukubheka eYurophu.

philippi.name: IFilipi
philippi.note: Ibandla lokuqala laseYurophu — ivangeli linqoba ngisho nasetilongweni.
events: Amahubo phakathi kwamabili, ukuzamazama komhlaba, umndeni wonogada usindisiwe

corinth.name: IKorinte
corinth.note: Uhlala unyaka nesigamu, etshala ibandla edolobheni elinobubi.

ephesus.name: I-Efesu
ephesus.note: Inhliziyo yohambo lwesithathu — izwi lisabalala kulo lonke i-Asia.
events: Ukufundisa nsuku zonke iminyaka emibili ehholo likaThiranu

miletus.name: IMiletu
events: Amalunga ayakhala, azi ukuthi ngeke aphinde ambone

caesarea.name: IKesariya
caesarea.note: Iminyaka emibili uvikela ivangeli phambi kwababusi nenkosi.

jerusalem.name: IJerusalema
jerusalem.note: Ubanjwa ethempelini, indlela yakhe njengesiboshwa iyaqala.
events: Njengesakhamuzi saseRoma, uthunyelwa ngaphansi kohlonzwana eKesariya

crete.name: IKrethe
crete.note: Ngemva kokukhululwa kwakhe, isiqhingi lapho ashiya khona uThithu ukuze ahlele amabandla.
events: Ushiya uThithu ukuze amise amalunga kuwo wonke amadolobha

malta.name: IMelitha
malta.note: Kudlula isiphepho nokuphahlazeka komkhumbi, isithembiso sikaNkulunkulu siyema.
events: Umoya ‘onyakatho-mpumalanga’ uphahlaza umkhumbi, kodwa bonke abangu-276 bayasinda

rome.name: IRoma
rome.note: Ekugcineni ivangeli lifinyelela enhliziyweni yombuso — akusiyo isiphetho kodwa isiqalo.
events: Iminyaka emibili egadiwe endlini, ememezela umbuso ngesibindi
Kamuva uphinde aboshwe, ubhala u-2 Thimothewu abulawelwe ukukholwa — “Ngiyilwile ukulwa okuhle, ngiqedile ukugijima”
